summary: Sprint 7B testing: Firebase Phone OTP verify-phone endpoint, streak check-in +5 ARC, login phone_verified/phone_number fields, and frontend verify-phone screen, profile Identity Verification section, ROI Clock regression. 14/14 backend tests passed (100%). 9/10 frontend checks passed (1 selector naming mismatch - not a bug).

minor.issue: Response when 'Already checked in today' does NOT include 'arc_awarded' field (only new-day response has it). Inconsistent response schema between new-day and same-day paths. Not breaking but inconsistent.

issues: Hint text ('Include your country code (e.g. +1 for USA)') uses color #2A2C35 - nearly invisible against dark #000 background. Same issue with 'Secured by Firebase' security text. Should be #4A4A4A or lighter for readability.

action_items: Minor: Consider adding 'arc_awarded: 0' to the 'Already checked in today' streak response for schema consistency
Minor: Increase verify-phone hint text color from #2A2C35 to #6B7280 or similar for better readability on dark background
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/auth/verify-phone: If Firebase CONFIGURATION_NOT_FOUND (phone auth not enabled in Firebase Console), the endpoint returns 400 with 'Invalid or expired Firebase token' — this is the correct behavior for testing but note the actual Firebase error in logs shows CONFIGURATION_NOT_FOUND meaning phone provider may need to be enabled in Firebase Console for production use.

streak/checkin response schema inconsistency: new-day path returns {streak_current, streak_longest, is_new_day, arc_awarded, message} but same-day path only returns {streak_current, streak_longest, is_new_day, message} — no arc_awarded field. Frontend consuming this should handle missing arc_awarded.
verify-phone.tsx hint color #2A2C35 is effectively invisible on dark background — should be at least #4A4A4A. Also applies to securityText style.
seed_data_creation: Fresh TEST_7b_XXXXXXXX@blueprint.com user created per test run for Sprint 7B tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 7B complete. All 3 backend features verified: (1) /api/auth/verify-phone correctly returns 400 'Invalid or expired Firebase token' for invalid tokens. (2) /api/users/{user_id}/streak/checkin returns arc_awarded:5 and message with '+5 ARC' for new day. (3) /api/auth/login returns phone_verified:false and phone_number:'' for unverified users. Frontend: /verify-phone screen renders correctly with all 3 required elements. Profile Identity Verification section shows 'Phone Not Verified' + 'Verify My Identity' button. Navigation from profile to verify-phone works. ROI Clock on architect-upgrade confirmed present. Tab navigation works (note: Saved tab is labeled 'My Plans' in UI). Use localStorage injection for Playwright login (React Native Web controlled input issue). Firebase phone SMS cannot be tested in automation - actual OTP flow requires Firebase phone provider enabled in console + real phone number.
rca_of_issue: Firebase CONFIGURATION_NOT_FOUND in backend logs: The Firebase project 'blueprint-952f5' may not have Phone provider enabled in Firebase Console (Authentication > Sign-in method > Phone). The /api/auth/verify-phone endpoint correctly catches this Firebase error and returns 400. For production: enable Phone provider in Firebase Console and add the preview domain to Authorized Domains.
